_comment: Pterodactyl Egg — Ranger Aide Memoire MkDocs wiki. Panel variables are SECRETS ONLY (the GitHub TOKEN). Non-secret settings (REPO, BRANCH, SYNC_INTERVAL, SITE_NAME, SITE_DESCRIPTION) live in config.yaml at the repo root — edit on GitHub, Reinstall the server to apply.
name: Ranger Aide Memoire Wiki
author: j6@5ranger.cc
description: MkDocs Material wiki for the 5 RANGER unit, fed from a GitHub content repo. entry.py polls the repo every SYNC_INTERVAL seconds; on a new commit it downloads the tarball, renders mkdocs.yml from manifest.yaml, runs `python -m mkdocs build`, and serves the result via stdlib http.server. Single foreground process, one port. Non-secret configuration lives in config.yaml at the repo root and is edited via GitHub; only the GitHub TOKEN stays in the panel.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ── Ranger Aide Memoire Wiki install script ───────────────────────────────
# Runs on server creation AND every Reinstall. Reinstall is how GitHub
# changes propagate: it re-clones the repo, picking up the latest
# config.yaml and any code edits. State (.pydeps cache, state.json, site/)
# is preserved on the persistent /home/container volume.

set -e

echo 'Installing host packages (git only — the rest is pure-Python)…'
apt-get update -y -q
apt-get install -y -q git curl

echo 'Cloning code repository…'
git clone https://github.com/Gibsx/5-RANGER-MkDocs /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

chown -R container:container /mnt/server

echo ''
echo '────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────'
echo 'Install complete. Set the SECRET (GitHub TOKEN) on the Startup tab'
echo 'and Start. Non-secret config (REPO, BRANCH, SYNC_INTERVAL, SITE_NAME,'
echo 'SITE_DESCRIPTION) lives in config.yaml — edit there, Reinstall to apply.'
echo 'First boot: ~60–120s to bootstrap pip deps + run initial sync.'
echo 'Subsequent boots: <10s (deps cached in .pydeps/ on the volume).'
echo '────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────'

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: [SECRET] Fine-grained GitHub Personal Access Token with Contents: Read on the content repo. github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/new — fine-grained, single-repo, Contents:Read only. Required even for public repos because GitHub's anonymous quota is 60/hr; authenticated is 5000/hr.
